llm_keywords.evidence: The absolute current magnitude |I| decreases from approximately 2.4E-5 A at -6 V to about 8.9E-103 A near -0.1 V.
The current magnitude |I| values for positive voltages mirror those for negative voltages, e.g., |I| near 0.1 V is about 6.9E-103 A, similar to the value near -0.1 V.
The ln(|I|/V^2) values decrease approximately linearly with increasing 1/|V|, e.g., ln(|I|/V^2) changes from -14.22 at 1/|V|=0.1667 to -230.38 at 1/|V|=10.
Device_area is constant at 20 um^2 and Device_thickness is constant at 2 nm for all data points.
